parsed.recommendation_text: For an office desk setup, the Voltix 65W charger offers a balance of power and affordability. It supports both USB-C and USB-A ports with GaN technology for efficient charging. Though it runs slightly warm, its compact form factor makes it ideal for desktop use. The included cable is a plus, but be aware that build quality may feel plasticky compared to higher-end brands.
parsed.selection_rationale: Offers good power at low cost; includes cable; suitable for desk use.
